description_long: This is a stylish, light-colored fedora hat with a wide, flat brim and a flat-topped crown featuring a distinct pinch at the front. The hat is adorned with a decorative fabric band that wraps around the base of the crown, tied into a small knot on one side, and features a subtle pattern. The brim is slightly distressed at the edges, giving it a worn, urban-chic appearance. The crown is structured and maintains a crisp, geometric shape, while the band adds a touch of visual interest and texture. The overall finish is matte, with a soft, felt-like surface that suggests comfort and quality. This hat would be well-suited for fashionable urban environments, blending classic design with contemporary flair.
description: A light-colored fedora with a wide, flat brim, flat-topped crown, and a patterned fabric band tied at the side. The hat has a matte, felt-like finish and a slightly distressed brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat-topped crown, pinched front, and the decorative band tied in a knot on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical pinch at the back of the crown and the continuous patterned band.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the uninterrupted band and the flat, wide brim with a slightly distressed edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the band knot less visible, emphasizing the clean lines of the crown and brim.
